title: Range Intent Composer
prompt:
Create a production-ready Range Intent Composer using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Build an accessible budget filter that pairs a native range input with three clear intent stops: Explore, Target, and Stretch. Moving the range updates a labelled numeric amount and advances a cyan marker across a quiet scale; selecting a stop sets a deterministic value. Use a white Bento panel on #F4F5F6 with #ECECEE borders, 22px corners, soft neutral shadow, #111111 text, and #4A4A4F helper copy. Cyan is the only bright accent. Do not use gradients on the card or make position the only state cue.

Use an explicit label for the range, output text with aria-live polite, and buttons with aria-pressed for the three stops. All controls need a 44px minimum touch target where practical. Click, Enter, and Space select the same stop. Hover lifts stop buttons 2px over 180ms and press compresses them 1px over 90ms. Move the marker using a stiffness 340, damping 28 spring and fade the helper text over 160ms. Manual range changes must update the active descriptive state without hidden side effects. Use local state only; do not include timers, random values, browser storage, remote content, or network calls.

At 320px, wrap stop buttons and keep the amount legible above the slider. On larger previews, remain compact and avoid unrelated dashboard chrome. Keep tab order logical, use a 3px dark focus ring, maintain AA contrast, and give state text beyond color. Prefer transform and opacity. Honor prefers-reduced-motion with instant marker movement or a 120ms fade. Return complete TypeScript React client code and a runnable pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML: <label>Monthly budget <input class="uiwiki-range" type="range" min="0" max="100"></label> */
.uiwiki-range{display:block;width:100%;margin-top:16px;accent-color:#0891b2}.uiwiki-range:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:4px}.uiwiki-range+output{display:block;margin-top:8px;color:#111;font:900 24px system-ui}.uiwiki-range~button{min-height:44px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:12px;background:#fff;font-weight:800}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-range{transition:none}}
